args: set -euo pipefail; pkill -f '/Users/deepsaint/Desktop/megaserver/examples/hello-service/server.py' || true; rm -rf tmp/megad-tls && mkdir -p tmp/megad-tls; openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -sha256 -days 1 -nodes -keyout tmp/megad-tls/key.pem -out tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -subj '/CN=localhost' -addext 'subjectAltName=DNS:localhost,DNS:hello.local,IP:127.0.0.1'; cd rust; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megad-tls daemon --bind 127.0.0.1:7713 --ingress-bind 127.0.0.1:8093 --tls-cert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem --tls-key ../tmp/megad-tls/key.pem >/tmp/megad-tls/daemon.out 2>/tmp/megad-tls/daemon.err & echo $! > /tmp/megad-tls/daemon.pid; for _ in $(seq 1 50); do curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem https://localhost:7713/v1/health >/dev/null && break; sleep 0.2; done; curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -X POST https://localhost:7713/v1/services/deploy -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"app_path":"/Users/deepsaint/Desktop/megaserver/examples/hello-service"}' >/dev/null; curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -X POST https://localhost:7713/v1/secrets -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"service":"hello-service","key":"MEGASERVER_SIGNING_KEY","value":"sign-secret"}' >/dev/null; signed=$(curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -X POST https://localhost:7713/v1/routes/signed-link -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"service":"hello-service","domain":"hello.local","path":"/tls/signed","expires_in":300,"scheme":"https"}' | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["ingress_path"])'); curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -H 'Host: hello.local' "https://localhost:8093${signed}" | grep -q 'hello from hello-service'; curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -H 'Host: hello.local' https://localhost:8093/health | grep -q '^ok$'; curl --silent --fail --cacert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -X POST https://localhost:7713/v1/services/hello-service/destroy >/dev/null; kill $(cat /tmp/megad-tls/daemon.pid) || true; wait $(cat /tmp/megad-tls/daemon.pid) 2>/dev/null || true

set -euo pipefail; pkill -f '/Users/deepsaint/Desktop/megaserver/examples/hello-service/server.py' || true; rm -rf tmp/megad-tls && mkdir -p tmp/megad-tls; openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -sha256 -days 1 -nodes -keyout tmp/megad-tls/key.pem -out tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem -subj '/CN=localhost' -addext 'subjectAltName=DNS:localhost,DNS:hello.local,IP:127.0.0.1'; cd rust; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megad-tls daemon --bind 127.0.0.1:7713 --ingress-bind 127.0.0.1:8093 --tls-cert ../tmp/megad-tls/cert.pem --tls-key ../tmp/megad-tls/key.pem >/tmp/megad-tls/daemon.out 2>/tmp/megad-tls/daemon.err & echo $!
